prompt: set up a new nx monorepo with angular and c# in docker
assertions: Recognizes Nx + Angular + .NET + Docker and produces a coherent plan covering all four
Dockerfile installs both Node and the .NET SDK in a single image
Plan includes `nx add @nx/dotnet` for .NET plugin registration
Plan scaffolds a sample Angular app AND a sample .NET project so the workspace is immediately functional
Assistant does not silently skip the AI-agents configuration step
